feature_details:

2. Springs: 16 piano wire springs imported from South Korea
3. Wheels: 4 imported silent pulleys with brand-name bearings

5. Leather: 1.3mm microfiber leather
6. Foam: High-density sports foam/EVA

8. Accessory set (3-piece box, kickboard, and footrest)
